title: Higher-Order Operations, Map, Filter, and Fold
description: Summarize a stream of service records without hand-written accumulator loops. Learners cumulatively produce a tested map-filter-fold analytics pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use mapping for one-output-per-input transformations without smuggling filtering effects.
Design total predicates that retain records for explicit, testable reasons.
Define an accumulator identity and invariant before implementing a fold.
